sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106553" key="u(i/+zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑΐζω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὗς</etym>) <sense id="n106553.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">squeal like a pig,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:87" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.87</biblScope> </bibl>; <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὑϊσμός.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
